item.title: Let this sink in. Luigi Mangioni
item.description: NYC is bought and paid , they bow to the elite and forget about the people
item.dc:creator: jayjay59

item.title: For those feeling left out this month.
item.description: Boss and HR say "contractors do not get bonuses". Wife gets ghosted when she informs them she is on the salary with benefits. Even if she was a contractor, not getting even a card saying thanks for all the hard work is soul crushing. A cheap box of chocolates at least means they acknowledge your existence. He other jobs gave her cards saying thanks and that means a lot to her. She works so hard all the time, even going out to shovel snow with pneumonia at the school (I get up early to help as her coworker never come in to help in the morning). She had a rough go this year, being sick so much and hell, even having a partial retinal detachment. I'm sad people just take her for granted all the time, she is a great worker, fantastic mother and a caring wife.
item.dc:creator: MrNobodyLivesHere

item.title: Brendan Fraser going to watch the Mummy movies
item.dc:creator: Ilovetomakestuffup

item.title: No more eggplant!!
item.description: I went in for SRS on Friday, which is something that's been in the works for a while. It's been a little over three years since I officially came out, and 13 years since I really started questioning. It's been an interesting and rewarding journey and I don't expect that to change anytime soon.
item.dc:creator: KrissCrossCat

item.title: Commissions open!
item.description:
FOR 10% OFF! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/link/CHRISTMAS - Hey guys I’m sorry for this blatant ad for my commissions! I hope you can forgive me ❤️ I’m opening commissions again to earn some money! I’m happy to draw a loved one, your OCs…whatever you want! If youd like to inquire you can DM me there or on discord, I just go by Miaormoa! Did you know if you join my patreon as a free or paid member, you can also access my server? patreon.com/miaormoa
I have 5 different commissions available!
An example of some of my work!
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.123 HOW THE COOKIE CRUMBLES
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Alison Friend
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Spectateur & La Cantina - Touk-Touk YouTube: https://youtu.be/pHFtzd9Ii6k?si=1pFXwBWRQkTS37w_ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7c8g6xoxoULuIHrrapSZkV?si=5ce1fdbfb7a04bd2
Aleriia V
Joo SongHee
Alena Kachan
Gevorg Grigoryan
GA IS
TBD
Pierre Alexandre
Kanu
Neil Ross
SoMuch3D
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Send Luigi some love.
item.description:
I did check to make sure this information is accurate. However, Do NOT send money to an inmate using this facility's address.
If you would like to send a monetary donation, instructions for your preferred method can be found here: https://www.bop.gov/inmates/communications.jsp
